title: 84 Pack Doll Fashion Set - Dress Up Clothes & Accessories for 11.5 Inch Dolls with Wedding Dress, Tops, Pants, Shoes, Bags, Necklaces & More
features: 【11.5 inch Doll Playset Include】1 Doll Closet, 1 Wedding Gown Dress, 1 Party Dress, 3 Fashion Dresses, 2 Tops and Pants Outfits, 4 Mini Dresses, 10 Pink Hangers, 10 Pairs of Shoes, 10 Necklaces, 10 Fashion Bags, 10 Butterflies, 10 Stars and 10 Flowers all in a gift box. 【🧡NOTE: Some items are random in style. Doll not included. Most shoes are suitable for slanted feet dolls.】

【Red Fashion Doll Closet】The 12.2 x 7.4 inch portable doll closet is stylish in interior style, decorated with some hooks and equipped with 6 lattices. After kids dress up the dolls, they can organize and storage their doll clothes and accessories in real working drawers and cabinets!

【Unique Design】This fashion design kit for 11.5 inch doll contains 11pcs of doll clothing and many beautiful doll accessories. Girls can design their own doll creations using butterflies, flowers and various decorations to their liking, enriching their imagination!

【Perfect Gifts for Girls】All the doll stuff comes in a beautiful gift box. Give this fashion pack to girls and teens as a gift for birthday, Children's Day, Halloween, Christmas, Thanksgiving and fun parties. Your kids will love them! Great toy gifts for 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10-year-old girls.

【High Quality Materials】Doll party dresses, doll princess clothing, doll shoes and beautiful doll stuff are all made of soft, comfortable, safe and durable materials. Made with elastic and stickable design, it's easy to put on and take off, perfect for 11.5 inch dolls.
description: Product Description Doll Closet with Clothes and Accessories for 11.5 Inch Girl Dolls A Fashion Doll Closet with Various Styles of Clothing and Accessories Includes 1 random doll wedding dress to help you design your fashion dress. There are 6 compartments for you to storage different doll clothes and accessories. Carrying handles make the doll closet easy to store or carry around. Random Style 1 Fixed Dress 1 Party Dress 2 Random Dresses 2 Random Tops & Pants 4 Random Mini Dresses 1 Random Doll Wedding Gown Dress Easy To Design Endless Fun to Your Kids Brilliant material can offer you a better feeling. Careful designs give you new feelings about beauty. Fashion Design & Handmade Safe & Durable Easy to put on and take off Soft & Comfortable Perfect Gift for Kids, Especially Little Girls Package Includes: 1 Doll Closet 1 Wedding Gown Dress 1 Party Dress 2 Tops and Pants 3 Fashion Dresses 4 Mini Doll Dresses 10 Bags 10 Hangers 10 Pairs of Shoes 10 Necklaces 10 Stars 10 Flowers 10 Butterflies NOTE: Some items are random in style. Doll Not Included. Most shoes are suitable for slanted feet dolls.
